is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person cannot prove they hold Belgian nationality.

holds_belgian_nationality.name: holds_belgian_nationality
holds_belgian_nationality.description: The person holds Belgian nationality (directly assertable background status).

is_eu_citizen.name: is_eu_citizen
is_eu_citizen.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

falls_under_eu_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_eu_free_movement_law
falls_under_eu_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under EU law on free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is not an EU citizen and does not fall under EU free movement law.

meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

in_illegal_residence.name: in_illegal_residence
in_illegal_residence.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting or no longer meeting the conditions for entry or residence.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsibility_determination_.name: subject_to_responsibility_determination_procedure
subject_to_responsibility_determination_.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the responsible member state for an international protection request.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: There is a current and real risk that the person will abscond, established after individual examination based on objective criteria.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed to assess risk of absconding.

holds_valid_travel_document.name: holds_valid_travel_document
holds_valid_travel_document.description: The person holds a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_home_authority.name: recognised_as_national_by_home_authority
recognised_as_national_by_home_authority.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_nationality_category_for_min.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
falls_under_nationality_category_for_min.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer directly.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The person qualifies as an identified foreigner under the statutory definition.

no_residence_application_filed_after_ill.name: no_residence_application_filed_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_filed_after_ill.description: The person did not file a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not submit an international protection request within the legally prescribed period.

used_false_information_or_documents.name: used_false_information_or_documents
used_false_information_or_documents.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a protection, residence, removal, or pushback procedure.

fails_to_cooperate_with_authorities.name: fails_to_cooperate_with_authorities
fails_to_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement or supervision of immigration regulations.

indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_m.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_m.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

subject_to_active_entry_ban.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
subject_to_active_entry_ban.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in Belgium and/or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

filed_new_application_immediately_after_.name: filed_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
filed_new_application_immediately_after_.description: The person filed a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refusal of entry or residence, end of stay, or a pushback or removal measure.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.description: When questioned on the point, the person concealed that they had previously given fingerprints in another state bound by EU rules on determining the state responsible for an international protection request.

multiple_applications_with_negative_outc.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes
multiple_applications_with_negative_outc.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in Belgium or other member states that resulted in negative decisions or did not lead to a residence permit.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: When questioned on the point, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by EU rules on determining the responsible state.

entered_for_purposes_other_than_stated_a.name: entered_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application
entered_for_purposes_other_than_stated_a.description: The person declared or their file shows they came to Belgium for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection request or residence application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unfounded.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unfounded.description: The person is subject to a fine for having filed a manifestly unfounded appeal with the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

absconding_criterion_met.name: absconding_criterion_met
absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the statutory objective criteria for risk of absconding is met for the person.
